notes: Universal floor (cell-mean, ctrl-pred, donor-shift, linear-PCA) via run_job; Kang IFN-beta LOCT.
Universal floor on the Soskic donor LODO; same loader the heavy C2 runners reuse.
Universal floor on the five CRISPR datasets; C3 is always real (multi-dataset).
Universal floor on the Frangieh leave-one-KO RNA folds; C4 is always real.
Universal floor on the OP3 unseen-compound split.
FP-ridge chemistry prior + floor on the OP3 fine 6-lineage LOCT (the headline FP-ridge cell).
Reproducible CPU conditioned baseline (linear gene-space shift on a leak-safe KO embedding) + scGen leg on the Frangieh leave-one-KO split.
CellOT on Kang IFN-beta LOLO; in-process cellot_runner needs the cellot env interpreter.
CellOT on Soskic donor LODO (the headline 0.3666 cell); full 106 donors. --chunk I N shards across GPUs.
CellOT on Frangieh leave-one-KO RNA (Axis-2). Shells the model step into the cellot env.
scPRAM on Kang LOCT; subprocess into the ivc-scpram env.
scPRAM on Soskic donor LODO; --chunk I N shards donors across GPUs.
scPRAM on Frangieh leave-one-KO RNA, run honestly as an OT floor (not_defined on KO).
CPA on Soskic donor LODO (latent delta); --chunk I 2 + two --gpu launches shard across 2 GPUs.
CPA on Frangieh leave-one-KO RNA (Axis-2 latent fill).
Native chemistry-aware chemCPA on OP3 unseen-compound. Positional args: <seed> <out_dir> [max_cells] [epochs].
scGen type-I IFN program recovery on Kang LOCT; CPU-capable scperturbench_eval env.
scGen + floors on the Soskic donor LODO (same script as the C2 floor; scGen is the conditioned leg). GPU optional via --scgen-accelerator gpu.
scGen leg on the Frangieh leave-one-KO split (same script as linear-shift-KOemb C4).
CINEMA-OT entropic-OT on Frangieh leave-one-KO RNA (Axis-2). --chunk I N shards folds across 2 GPUs.
arc-STATE on Kang LOCT; subprocess into the ivc-state env. --smoke forces CPU.
arc-STATE on Soskic donor LODO; --chunk I 2 shards donors across 2 GPUs.
arc-STATE on Frangieh leave-one-KO RNA (Axis-2 hybrid fill).
GEARS + AttentionPert graph fills on Frangieh leave-one-KO RNA; --full runs the real split (no --full = smoke).
Same runner as GEARS C4; graph_frangieh.py runs both Graph-family models in one pass.
PertAdapt (GO-masked scFoundation adapter) on Soskic donor LODO; --chunk I 2 shards across 2 GPUs. Published-anchor gate is scripts/pertadapt_validate.py.

Foundation model run through the scPerturBench eval harness (registry path needs an absent model_runners/ dir). Not runnable from this repo: see REPRODUCE.md (scPerturBench harness) to reproduce the C3 scGPT cell.
